flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Central State University are 34% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($33.3k vs $50.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central State University fell 56% between 2021 and 2024 (6.0k → 2.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central State University fell 28% between 2006 and 2009 (27.0% → 19.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.3k → $8.1k).
